item.title: 12 Awesome and Useful Websites
item.description:
Listen to radio around the world https://radio.garden
Wondering where that plane, jet, or helicopter is going? (NOTE Don't buy anything on that site just use it for further info only) https://www.flightradar24.com/
This website has every single pc game from the 70's,80's,90's till the early 2000's. https://oldgamesdownload.com/
You can use it to "send emails to the future you". It helps put into perspective how much has changed over the course of a year https://www.futureme.org/
Show a list of popular products that are currently at their lowest price in the last year https://lp.deals
Gives free access to download almost any research paper https://sci-hub.mksa.top/
Is a far better option than old games download https://www.myabandonware.com/
Download almost any textbook as e-copy https://libgen.is/
Online image editor with similar features to Photoshop https://www.photopea.com/
Terms of Service, Didn’t Read summarizes terms of service and rates them for privacy. https://tosdr.org/
A digital archive of the World Wide Web. Get snapshots of how the web looked in the past https://archive.org/web/
Combines all the softwares you want into a single package that you can easily install http://ninite.com/
item.dc:creator: Farrahfowler

item.dc:creator: SnoopDoggyDawg

item.title: You've got some..bottom shelf memes on your face.
item.description:
Psst. Here's an idea, Secret Santa. ;)
@SebastianCrab edit: Know your limits.
Maybe that's why he's such a fucking asshole.
@JKBenton I absolutely adore your work, and I sincerely apologize for disgracing your art, but....Magoo fit here so well.
Imgur's Secret Santa is HERE!! Don't give your money to Bezos this year. Instead, why don't we support our Imgur entrepreneurs? If you are a creator, you can promote your merchandise on discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka in our # shameless-self-promos channel. (Please be sure to pick up the "Creator" role in onboarding) If you're not a creator, you are still invited to join to support our Imgurian artists! discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
You can catch me live on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka streaming with my favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community server.
Join for the games! We've been playing Pay Day 3, GTA V, Jackbox, Among Us, 7 Days to Die, Sea of Thieves, Barotrauma, Ultimate Chicken Horse...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tex channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) and Taco Supreme With The Sour Cream Mustache tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Jeff Bezos (Amazon founder) associated with Ghislaine Maxwell and Jeffrey Epstein--even after he was a known child predator. Bezos even invited the pair to his PRIVATE INVITATION ONLY weekend retreat.
item.description: In addition; Bezos cheated on his wife with a woman he affectionately called "my alive girl" and he is generally considered a high-level-functioning psychopath by those who worked with him at Amazon. The more you know...
item.dc:creator: JasonMartinIII

item.description: Or just "media consumption station" for those arguing it doesn't fit the traditional description of social media. You don't need to earn followers to have fun and get interactions. I think that's really important. Anyone can be anonymously relevant here, don't ever change that. (originally posted by @etherealfaeriemonster on 2022-12-06 07:06:00)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: The 362nd vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps
item.description:
DISCLAIMER: I do not support or condone terrorism
DXNS
@AbbiStabbi
I sure hope I'm not going to happen
Groin, back, butt crack
I'llFuckinDoItAgain.gif
ooooh, sexy memes coming up
What a bunch of hippocrips
*goes right
Starting January 1st, I will have a new Signature Image. One I had commissioned. It's so cute. FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #Phone_Dump #Dump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple

item.title: Wholesome post to brighten your day 1217
item.description:
https://imgur.com/gallery/kJKlQHW Wholesome Post 1216 https://imgur.com/gallery/Cb8SJce Wholesome Post 1215 https://imgur.com/gallery/s1klU5A Wholesome Post 1214 https://imgur.com/gallery/oaC43Wu Wholesome Post 1213 https://imgur.com/gallery/GXqab2z Wholesome Post 1212 https://imgur.com/gallery/5fRsZMY Wholesome Post 1211 https://imgur.com/gallery/5wfv8fp Wholesome Post 1210
I include a Gofundme link in all of my posts to help raise money for people in need. I hope we can help And if you're unable to donate, sharing the gofundme can help too https://www.gofundme.com/f/37hpfo640o
I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support, would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48
I hope this post brightened your day :) and i hope it is a lovely day for you! If you need to talk I am always available on discord (username HaveAGreatDay# 9735) and happy to listen. You matter, and if you are struggling please reach out for help. I made a wholesome support server on discord, whether you need support, would like to give it or just want to chat with some lovely people and look at some wholesome things it's a nice place. Here's the link if you'd like to join us. https://discord.gg/8M983spH48

item.title: Brother in law spending first holiday season away from his family
item.description: New brother in law is spending his first holiday season with our family instead of his own, we asked if he wanted anything as we try to be inviting to all of the marry-ins 1) we were just trying to be nice and inviting 2) you could have said Mac and cheese or pizza rolls for all we care 3) now you get nothing, and we will probably not ask again, have fun with mom’s dry turkey

item.title: I stole this dump, so you don't have to. Tuesday random meme dump
item.description:
1
2
3
4
5
6
8
9
10
11
12 Currently in a climate when winter and snow is coming... felling like this, also fuck winter.
13 And finally I would like to share something from myself. I've been working very hard (in the past 8 months) on Stanley Parable-like game with a touch of GladOS from Portal. The demo is out now and it made to TOP 10 on Steam's demo trending tab! And it features witty signs like this one here. "What?", I hear you ask. "I can read funny signs for free?" YES, yes you can! Try it now on Steam and please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Thank you, and if this dump made you smile at least once, I am happy with it! : )
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Tuesday Inspiration
item.dc:creator: samuelmgill

item.title: Learning about Belgium, with the country's newest, biggest fan
item.description:
I recently had cause to become a big fan of Belgium (https://imgur.com/gallery/E3JwRum) but if you'd asked me a few weeks ago what I knew about the country, it would have been something like "Well uh... the waffles of course... and... it's near France and Germany... right?" So come along with this clueless American while I learn a little about my new favorite country where all the women are strong, all the men are good-looking, and all the children are above average.
^ Actual photo of OP on the way to learn about Belgium ^ The first weird thing I found was that there's a King AND multiple parliamentary governments, but sometimes there's no national government at all, and that's apparently not a big deal. https://www.brusselstimes.com/124777/belgium-breaks-own-record-for-longest-period-without-government
Next - Let's say for the sake of argument that you're a vampire. You've just bought your first velvet cloak and finally saved up enough for a down payment on that countryside castle you've always dreamed about. So - you head off to Transylvania, right? Nope. You go to Belgium. Most castles out of anyone anywhere. Every other country in the world needs to step up their castle game.
Bigass taxes, but they fund the healthcare system, education, and social security. Based on the memes I came across while researching this, it kinda seems like maybe a little more of that should go to roads? Belgians, any thoughts on this?
They really like statues of things peeing on things. Not just the famous Mannekin Pis pictured above, but there's a girl version called Jeanneke Pis (which I'm not posting here for multiple reasons) and a dog one as well called Zinneke Pis.
And then there's the chocolate
I've learned that you do not argue with a Belgian about chocolate. Just don't.
And of course the beer. It seems that there are over 1,000 different varieties of beer brewed in Belgium, and EACH ONE HAS ITS OWN GLASS.
That one on the bottom, third from the right - I believe that's called the Walter White Ale.
They have a beer pipeline, guys. A beer pipeline. https://www.theguardian.com/world/2016/jul/08/bruges-pipe-dream-a-reality-beer-pipeline
Also fries. It seems they made fries first. One article I encountered said that it wasn't so much about France taking claim, more about American soldiers buying them from French-speaking people (in and around Belgium) and dubbing them French Fries as a result. I dunno. Wasn't there.
Speaking of which, it's an extremely multilingual country. The data I found says that about 10% are FULLY bilingual or more, with most people even in the single-language regions speaking at least a little of another. Things I'll just brush over because this post got long: * Belgium was the second country in the world to legalize gay marriage * They invented the Smurfs and the Saxophone (though I'm pretty sure I read somewhere that there was debate about the saxophone) * Many public bathrooms are paid access only. That's a little weird, guys. * Sadly, Belgium has its share of racism/Islamophobia/far-right extremism
(Disclaimer: I deliberately didn't touch on Belgian war history and such, as I don't yet feel qualified to explain or debate that)
item.dc:creator: Magnebro
